productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Blue Red Checked Shirt
description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has black and orange plaid checks with white and blue accents, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, foldover cuffs with pink gingham piping details, appliqued patch over right sleeve, patch pockets on the chest with zippered closure, appliqued badge on top of the left chest pocket, full length buttoned placket with a snap button at the end and with pink gingham facing placket lining and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  orange and blue plaid check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
